name: Research Digest AI
tagline: Turn any topic into a structured, reviewable knowledge digest.
description:
Research Digest AI turns any topic into a clean, structured knowledge digest you can review, approve, and keep.

Enter a topic and pick a depth (Quick / Standard / Deep Dive). The app borrows the Anna AI runtime — it calls the host LLM (anna.llm.complete) to synthesize four structured cards — Summary, Key Points, Key Concepts, and Related Topics — plus a confidence signal. You review and approve before anything is saved to your persistent library (anna.storage), and you can click a related topic to chain into the next digest.

**What's inside**

- A clean single-window UI (structured cards, dark theme, saved-library sidebar).
- Host LLM synthesis via `anna.llm.complete` and a persistent library via `anna.storage` — no custom backend.
- `research-coach` — a declarative SKILL.md that picks depth and enforces the human-review step in chat.
